chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 638 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.3556/2025 2. For order on Misc. No.3557/2025 3. For order on Misc. No.3558/2025 4. For hearing of main case 18.02.2025 Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-4. This petition seeks implementation of order rendered in the customs hierarchy ostensibly in favour of the petitioner. In view of the judgment dated 09.08.2024, of the Supreme Court in the case of Khalid alias Muhammad Khalid and others vs. Collector of Customs (Adjudication), Customs House Lahore etc. (Civil Petition No.3391 of 2024), petition is not maintainable, hence, the same is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
